Legal Document

Privacy Policy

Drake's Workshop is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data our applications collect, how it is used, and your rights as a user.

Effective Date: April 28, 2026

01. Introduction

This Privacy Policy applies to all mobile applications and services published by Drake's Workshop ("we", "us", or "our") on the Google Play Store, including but not limited to Arena Clash and WorkFind. By downloading, installing, or using any of our applications, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

If you do not agree with this policy, please do not install or use our applications. We may update this policy from time to time; continued use of our apps after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised policy.

02. Information We Collect

2.1 Information Collected Automatically

When you use our applications, the following data may be collected automatically:

  • Device information (device model, operating system version, unique device identifiers)
  • App usage data (features accessed, time spent, in-app events)
  • Crash reports and diagnostic information
  • Network information (IP address, mobile network details)
  • General location data (country/region, derived from IP address only)

2.2 Information You Provide

Certain features may ask you to voluntarily provide information, such as:

  • Email address (for support requests or account creation)
  • Username or display name (for gaming features)
  • Feedback or messages sent to our support team

2.3 What We Do Not Collect

We do not collect precise GPS location, contacts, photos, financial information, or any data unnecessary for the core function of the application.

03. How We Use Your Information

We use the collected information solely to:

  • Operate, maintain, and improve our applications
  • Diagnose and fix technical issues and crashes
  • Respond to support requests and user feedback
  • Understand how users interact with our apps (aggregate analytics only)
  • Comply with legal obligations

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party for marketing purposes.

04. Third-Party Services

Our applications may use third-party services that have their own privacy policies. These services may collect information used to identify you. Below is a list of third-party service providers we may use:

Google Play Services

Core Android platform services, app distribution, and licensing.

View Privacy Policy

Firebase (Google Analytics for Firebase)

Aggregate app usage analytics and crash reporting (Firebase Crashlytics).

View Privacy Policy

Google AdMob (if applicable)

Serving advertisements within free applications.

View Privacy Policy

05. Data Security

We value your trust and take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect any information processed by our applications. All data transmissions are encrypted using industry-standard TLS/HTTPS. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

06. Data Retention

We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. Diagnostic and analytics data is typically retained for no more than 24 months. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us at support@drakesworkshop.dev.

07. Children's Privacy

Our applications are not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately at support@drakesworkshop.dev, and we will take steps to delete such information promptly.

If a specific app is designed for a younger audience, a separate, compliant privacy notice will be provided for that app and it will not collect personal data.

08. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Right to Access: Request a copy of the data we hold about you.
  • Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • Right to Erasure: "Right to be forgotten" — request deletion of your data.
  • Right to Restrict Processing: Ask us to limit how we use your data.
  • Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a portable format.
  • Right to Opt-Out (CCPA): California residents may opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@drakesworkshop.dev. We will respond within 30 days.

09. Links to Other Sites

Our applications may contain links to external websites or services (e.g., Google Play Store, job listing sites). These external sites are not operated by us, and we have no control over their content or privacy practices. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of any site you visit.

10. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the "Effective Date" at the top of this page and, where appropriate, notify users through the application. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Your continued use of our applications after any changes indicates your acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please reach out:

Drake's Workshop

support@drakesworkshop.dev https://drakesworkshop.dev

Have more questions? We're always happy to help.

Contact Support
